name: MercadoPago
description: MercadoPago — LatAm payment platform by MercadoLibre covering Brazil, Mexico, Argentina, Chile, and Colombia with cards, PIX, and wallets.

seo.title: MercadoPago — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: MercadoPago: MercadoPago — LatAm payment platform by MercadoLibre covering Brazil, Mexico, Argentina, Chile, and Colombia with cards, PIX, and wallets.

when_to_use: PIX, card, and wallet payments for Brazil e-commerce via MercadoLibre platform
LatAm payment acceptance across Brazil, Mexico, Argentina, and Colombia
BNPL (Mercado Crédito) embedded at checkout for LatAm merchants
Marketplace split payments and escrow for LatAm two-sided platforms

pros: Deep LatAm reach via MercadoLibre ecosystem
cons: Docs and support uneven across countries
Settlement delays vs Stripe or dLocal
review.verdict: Default LatAm gateway given MercadoLibre's consumer dominance — use it for reach even when DX frustrates.
review.best_for: Merchants selling across Brazil, Mexico, Argentina, Chile, Colombia
review.not_for: Global merchants who can survive without MercadoLibre shoppers
